abilities.name: poison-point
abilities.shortEffect: Has a 30% chance of poisoning attacking Pokémon on contact.
abilities.effect: Whenever a move makes contact with this Pokémon, the move's user has a 30% chance of being poisoned.
abilities.flavorText: Contact with the Pokémon may poison the attacker.

abilities.name: rivalry
abilities.shortEffect: Increases damage inflicted to 1.25× against Pokémon of the same gender, but decreases damage to 0.75× against the opposite gender.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon inflicts 1.25× as much regular damage against Pokémon of the same gender and 0.75× as much regular damage against Pokémon of the opposite gender. If either Pokémon is genderless, damage is unaffected.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's competitive spirit makes it deal more damage to Pokémon of the same gender, but less damage to Pokémon of the opposite gender.

abilities.name: hustle
abilities.shortEffect: Strengthens physical moves to inflict 1.5× damage, but decreases their accuracy to 0.8×.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's physical moves do 1.5× as much regular damage, but have 0.8× their usual accuracy. Special moves are unaffected. Moves that do set damage, such as Seismic Toss, have their accuracy affected, but not their damage. Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, higher-levelled Pokémon have their encounter rate increased.
abilities.flavorText: Boosts the Pokémon's Attack stat but lowers its accuracy.
